userStories.title: Audit all active cold outreach campaigns
userStories.description: Create comprehensive audit of all SMS, email, and social media campaigns across Marceau Solutions and Southwest Florida Comfort.
acceptanceCriteria: Read all campaign files in lead-scraper/output/campaigns/
Read all SMS sequences in follow_up_sequences.json
Read all email sequences in scheduled_emails.json
Read all social media posts in social-media-automation/output/scheduled_posts.json
Create CAMPAIGN-AUDIT.md with full inventory

userStories.title: Analyze campaign performance metrics
userStories.description: Deep dive into campaign_analytics.json and outreach_history.json to understand what's working and what's not.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate response rate by template
Calculate response rate by pain point
Calculate response rate by business (Marceau vs SWFL)
Calculate response rate by channel (SMS vs email)
Calculate optimal send time (day/hour analysis)
Create PERFORMANCE-ANALYSIS.md with findings

userStories.title: Optimize SMS message templates
userStories.description: Based on performance data, rewrite underperforming SMS templates using Hormozi principles.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify bottom 3 performing templates
Rewrite each with stronger hook, clearer value prop
Keep under 160 characters
Include personalization ({business_name})
Include clear CTA
Save optimized templates to templates/sms/optimized/

userStories.title: Optimize email follow-up sequences
userStories.description: Review and optimize email templates for Hormozi's 7-touch framework.
acceptanceCriteria: Review existing email templates
Ensure 5-7 touch sequence exists for each campaign
Optimize subject lines for open rates
Ensure each email has different angle (still_looking, direct_question, soft_ask, breakup)
Save optimized templates to templates/email/optimized/

userStories.title: Optimize social media content calendar
userStories.description: Analyze social media posts and create optimized content calendar for organic engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze past post performance (likes, retweets, engagement)
Identify best performing content types
Create 2-week content calendar for each business
Balance promotional (20%) vs value (80%) content
Schedule optimal times (analyze historical engagement)
Save to SOCIAL-CONTENT-CALENDAR.md

userStories.title: Implement A/B test framework for all channels
userStories.description: Set up proper A/B testing for SMS, email, and social media to continuously improve.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ab_tests.json structure for tracking tests
Define test hypotheses for top 3 underperforming areas
Set up 50/50 split for each test
Define success metrics and statistical significance threshold (85%)
Document testing SOP in workflows/ab-testing-sop.md

userStories.title: Create unified campaign dashboard
userStories.description: Build a single dashboard showing all campaign metrics across channels.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/unified_dashboard.py
Aggregate SMS, email, and social media metrics
Show conversion funnel (contacted -> responded -> qualified -> meeting -> closed)
Show weekly trends
Output to HTML report in output/dashboard.html
Add CLI command: python -m src.unified_dashboard generate

userStories.title: Implement send time optimization
userStories.description: Analyze optimal send times and update scheduler to use them.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze response rates by hour and day of week
Identify top 3 optimal send windows
Update automation_daemon.py to respect optimal windows
Default: Tue-Thu, 10 AM - 2 PM local time
Skip Mon morning, Fri afternoon, weekends
Document in SEND-TIME-OPTIMIZATION.md

userStories.title: Create optimization recommendations report
userStories.description: Synthesize all findings into actionable recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create OPTIMIZATION-RECOMMENDATIONS.md
List top 10 quick wins (can implement immediately)
List top 5 medium-term improvements (1-2 weeks)
List top 3 strategic changes (requires planning)
Include expected impact for each recommendation
Prioritize by effort vs impact
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Final review of all recommendations

metadata.objective: Comprehensive optimization of all cold outreach campaigns (SMS, email, social media) across Marceau Solutions and Southwest Florida Comfort to improve response rates and ROI
